ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Dumplings with meat 94 % [WHEAT flour, meat 31,3 % (pork, beef), SOY flour, pork fat, vegetable oils (rapeseed, sunflower, coconut), onion, salt, spices, vinegar powder, flavourings], fried onion 6 % [vegetable oils (rapeseed, sunflower), onion].
